'''thosashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:zonary|zonary]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-s-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zonary|zonary]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thosashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thosashithi|thosashithi]] || [[word:thosashiji|thosashiji]] || [[word:thosashishi|thosashishi]] || [[word:thosashiki|thosashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thosashuthuthu|thosashuthuthu]] || [[word:thosashujuju|thosashujuju]] || [[word:thosashushushu|thosashushushu]] || [[word:thosashukuku|thosashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosashuthu|thosashuthu]] || [[word:thosashuju|thosashuju]] || [[word:thosashushu|thosashushu]] || [[word:thosashuku|thosashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosashufthuf|thosashufthuf]] || [[word:thosashufjuf|thosashufjuf]] || [[word:thosashufshuf|thosashufshuf]] || [[word:thosashufkuf|thosashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thosashethe|thosashethe]] || [[word:thosasheje|thosasheje]] || [[word:thosasheshe|thosasheshe]] || [[word:thosasheke|thosasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thosashothotho|thosashothotho]] || [[word:thosashojojo|thosashojojo]] || [[word:thosashoshosho|thosashoshosho]] || [[word:thosashokoko|thosashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosashotho|thosashotho]] || [[word:thosashojo|thosashojo]] || [[word:thosashosho|thosashosho]] || [[word:thosashoko|thosashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosashofthof|thosashofthof]] || [[word:thosashofjof|thosashofjof]] || [[word:thosashofshof|thosashofshof]] || [[word:thosashofkof|thosashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thosashĂŻfthĂŻf|thosashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thosashĂŻfjĂŻf|thosashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thosashĂŻfshĂŻf|thosashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thosashĂŻfkĂŻf|thosashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thosashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|thosashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thosashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|thosashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thosashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|thosashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thosashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|thosashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosashĂŻfthĂŻf|thosashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thosashĂŻfjĂŻf|thosashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thosashĂŻfshĂŻf|thosashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thosashĂŻfkĂŻf|thosashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosashĂŻfthĂŻf|thosashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thosashĂŻfjĂŻf|thosashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thosashĂŻfshĂŻf|thosashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thosashĂŻfkĂŻf|thosashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thosashĂŠthĂŠ|thosashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:thosashĂŠjĂŠ|thosashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:thosashĂŠshĂŠ|thosashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:thosashĂŠkĂŠ|thosashĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thosashathatha|thosashathatha]] || [[word:thosashajaja|thosashajaja]] || [[word:thosashashasha|thosashashasha]] || [[word:thosashakaka|thosashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosashatha|thosashatha]] || [[word:thosashaja|thosashaja]] || [[word:thosashasha|thosashasha]] || [[word:thosashaka|thosashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosashafthaf|thosashafthaf]] || [[word:thosashafjaf|thosashafjaf]] || [[word:thosashafshaf|thosashafshaf]] || [[word:thosashafkaf|thosashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thosashasha|thosashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thosashĂ«sha|thosashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thosashrosha|thosashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thosashmusha|thosashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thosashyasha|thosashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothosashnkshĂ«sha|gothosashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothosashnkrosha|gothosashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothosashnkmusha|gothosashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothosashnkyasha|gothosashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thosasashasha|thosasashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thosasashĂ«sha|thosasashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thosasashrosha|thosasashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thosasashmusha|thosasashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thosasashyasha|thosasashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothosasashnkshĂ«sha|gothosasashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothosasashnkrosha|gothosasashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothosasashnkmusha|gothosasashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothosasashnkyasha|gothosasashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thesĂŠshasha|thesĂŠshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thesĂŠshĂ«sha|thesĂŠshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thesĂŠshrosha|thesĂŠshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thesĂŠshmusha|thesĂŠshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thesĂŠshyasha|thesĂŠshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothesĂŠshnkshĂ«sha|gothesĂŠshnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothesĂŠshnkrosha|gothesĂŠshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothesĂŠshnkmusha|gothesĂŠshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothesĂŠshnkyasha|gothesĂŠshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thosfashasha|thosfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thosfashĂ«sha|thosfashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thosfashrosha|thosfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thosfashmusha|thosfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thosfashyasha|thosfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothosfashnkshĂ«sha|gothosfashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothosfashnkrosha|gothosfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothosfashnkmusha|gothosfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothosfashnkyasha|gothosfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
